summary: Complete testing of Firmes Ensino (Teaching) Module. Backend 34/34 tests passed. Frontend all 7 pages working: Escolas, Turmas, Estudos, Add forms, TurmaDetail, Acompanhamento, Exportar, Painel Academico. All CRUD operations, member assignment, and navigation validated.

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height warning - charts need container with defined dimensions
Missing Description or aria-describedby warning on dialogs (escola/estudo forms)

critical_code_review_comments: The Chart width/height warnings in console are pre-existing from the main dashboard - same as previous iterations.
DialogContent accessibility warnings for missing aria-describedby - low priority accessibility improvement.
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test data: TEST_Escola UI Teste, TEST_Escola Final Test, TEST_Turma para Detalhe
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ensino (Teaching) module fully tested. All 7 pages functional via sidebar submenu under 'Ensino'. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE for /api/church/estudos, /api/church/escolas, /api/church/turmas, /api/church/progresso-ensino, POST /api/church/turmas/{id}/membros, DELETE /api/church/turmas/{id}/membros/{member_id}, GET /api/church/ensino/painel-academico. Frontend routes: /dashboard/teaching/studies, /dashboard/teaching/schools, /dashboard/teaching/classes, /dashboard/teaching/tracking, /dashboard/teaching/export, /dashboard/teaching/dashboard.

sidebar_navigation.details: Ensino expandable menu with 6 sub-items: Estudos, Escolas, Turmas, Acompanhamento, Exportar, Painel Acadêmico

escolas_page.details: Shows escola cards with status badge (Ativa/Arquivada), turma count, responsavel and departamento info. Has search, Nova Escola button. Dialog form with nome, descricao, responsavel select, departamento select. Dropdown menu with Editar, Arquivar, Excluir

turmas_page.details: Shows turma cards with status badge (Ativa/Concluida), aluno count, escola name, professor name. Has search, status filter, escola filter, Nova Turma button. Cards are clickable to navigate to detail page. Dropdown with Ver Detalhes, Editar, Concluir, Excluir

add_turma_form.details: Form with nome, escola select, professor select, data_inicio, data_fim, status. Member selection section with search and checkboxes. URL: /dashboard/teaching/classes/add and /edit/:turmaId

turma_detail_page.details: Shows turma name, status badge, Export CSV button. KPI cards: Alunos, Professor, Escola, Inicio. Members table with remove button. Estudos vinculados section. URL: /dashboard/teaching/classes/:turmaId

estudos_page.details: Shows estudo cards with nivel badge (Basico/Intermediario/Avancado), status badge, escola and turma info. Has search, status filter, nivel filter, Novo Estudo button. Dropdown with Editar, Arquivar, Excluir

add_estudo_form.details: Form with titulo, descricao, categoria, nivel select, arquivo (link), escola select, turma select, status. URL: /dashboard/teaching/studies/add and /edit/:estudoId

acompanhamento_page.details: Split panel layout - member list on left with search, progress details on right. Shows member turmas, progresso records with estudo, turma, status, nota, observacao. Registrar Progresso dialog with turma, estudo, status, nota, observacao fields

exportar_page.details: Export options with tipo select (turmas, alunos, escolas), turma select when exporting alunos. Exportar CSV button triggers download

painel_academico.details: KPI cards: Escolas, Turmas Ativas, Alunos Matriculados, Estudos Ativos, Taxa Conclusao, Turmas Concluidas. Charts: Turmas por Escola, Estudos por Nivel. Top 10 Turmas por Alunos ranking

backend_crud_estudos.details: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/church/estudos with filters (status, nivel, escola_id, turma_id, search)

backend_crud_turmas.details: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/church/turmas with filters (status, escola_id, search), POST/DELETE membros

backend_painel.details: GET /api/church/ensino/painel-academico returns KPIs, escola_stats, turma_ranking, by_nivel

coverage: Escola CRUD (create, list, get, update, delete, search)
Member progress retrieval with turma links
